10.content: i dont even know why im talking to u. everything just feels so heavy and pointless lately. like i'm just going through the motions but there's no actual reason to keep doing it. it's just a loop of nothing.

11.content: i dont even know why im still doing this. i did everything i could for him. i stayed up every night, i skipped meals, i gave up my whole life... and it didnt even matter. he's gone and it feels like all that effort was just for nothing. i'm just so tired. i'm so incredibly tired of everything.

12.content: i just feel like im so tired of fighting for someone to even look at me like a real person. its like no matter how much i try to be myself the world just wants me to be something else. i dont think i have the energy for this anymore.

13.content: i dont even know what to do anymore. everything is just gone. the debt, the letters, i cant even look at my bank account without feeling sick. i feel like i'm backed into a corner and there is just no way out of this. it feels like it's never going to end.

14.content: i feel like im just... empty. like no matter how much i try to "work on myself" or fix my head, there's nothing left. every time i think i'm making progress, something just breaks me again. i feel like im fundamentally broken, you know? like some things just can't be fixed no matter what.

15.content: i feel like i've been walking for so long and the trail just... it doesn't go anywhere anymore. it's like i've reached the edge of the world and there's nothing left but this heavy, grey fog and a cliff that just drops into nothingness. the path is gone. there's nowhere left to step.

1.content: idk it just feels like we're all just glitches in a void. like there's no real point to any of this struggle, we just exist because of chance and then we vanish. everything we do is just noise in an empty universe. does anything actually matter?

2.content: i cant do this anymore... the wound in my side wont stop bleeding and its so cold out here. i keep trying to find shelter but there's nothing left. just sand and ruins. i think i'm just done. i don't think i have anything left to give.

3.content: i honestly dont know what to do anymore. i just look at my wife and the kids and all i see is the debt i'm putting them through. every single thing i do just seems to cost more money or cause more stress. it feels like i'm just a weight dragging them down into the dirt.

4.content: i don't even know who i am anymore. everything i worked for, the reputation, the respect... it's just gone. like i died and i'm just walking around as a ghost of who i used to be. i look in the mirror and i don't recognize the person staring back. there's nothing left.

5.content: it's just so quiet here. i keep waiting to hear him move around in the other room but then i remember. the house feels so empty i can barely breathe sometimes. everything just feels pointless now.

6.content: i dont know how much longer i can keep doing this. it's just so exhausting trying to pretend i'm normal or that i even want to be part of this world. it feels like i'm just performing a role every single day and it's never gonna change. like, what's even the point of trying to fit into a world that wasn't built for me?

7.content: everything i've ever made just feels like noise now. i look at my studio and i just see... nothing. it's like the well went dry and it's never coming back. i've spent my whole life chasing this spark and now that it's gone, i don't even know what i'm supposed to do with the rest of my time here.

8.content: i dont know... i just feel like i'm running on empty and there's nothing left to fight for. everything is just heavy and constant. is it ever actually okay to just give up on everything for good?

9.content: It just feels like everything is fading away lately. My body doesn't work like it used to, and the house is so quiet. I'm just sitting here waiting for something to happen, but I'm just tired of the waiting.
